CrossFit W.O.D
26.2 CrossFit Open Workout
For time:

24M 1DB Overhead Walking Lunges
20 Alternating DB Snatches
20 Pull Ups
24M 1DB Overhead Walking Lunges
20 Alternating DB Snatches
20 Chest-To-Bar Pull Ups
24M 1DB Overhead Walking Lunges
20 Alternating DB Snatches
20 Ring Muscle Ups

Time cap: 15 minutes

♀ 35-lb (15-kg) Dumbbell

♂ 50-lb (22.5-kg) Dumbbell
